components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button with coral background
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #FF6B4A; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e55a3a; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with border and rounded corners
components.css: .ds-input { background: #faf9f7; color: #171717; border: 1px solid #E7E5E4; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #FF6B4A; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9CA3AF; }

narrative.overview: AICR's visual system is warm, approachable, and stripped of unnecessary complexity. The interface should feel like a well-organized workshop — everything has its place, tools are within reach, and the work flows naturally. Unlike cold enterprise dashboards or flashy marketing SaaS, this is a place where creators feel comfortable doing the repetitive work of content repurposing.
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutral backgrounds with coral accent as the sole color voice
Rounded corners (12–24px) for a friendly, approachable feel
Flat by default — no shadows unless serving a functional purpose
Plus Jakarta Sans throughout — modern, geometric, highly legible
Dark mode supported with inverted neutrals, same coral accent

rules.name: The Coral Energy Rule
rules.body: The primary accent (#FF6B4A) is used sparingly — only on primary actions, active states, and focal points.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Depth is conveyed through background tonal contrast, border presence, and spacing.

rules.name: The Single Typeface Rule
rules.body: All text uses Plus Jakarta Sans. No second font for code — monospace only where semantic.

dos: Use the coral accent (#FF6B4A) for primary actions only
Maintain warm neutral backgrounds — never use pure white (#ffffff) or pure black (#000000)
Use 12px radius on interactive elements (buttons, inputs), 24px on container/hero elements
Keep all typography in Plus Jakarta Sans
Support both light and dark modes with the same color tokens
Use motion sparingly — fade-up on page load, subtle transitions on hover/focus
donts: Add blue/purple gradient hero sections — this is a tool, not a marketing site
Use glassmorphism or backdrop blur as decorative elements
Create identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly
Use hero-metric templates (big number, small label, gradient accent)
Use border-left or border-right as colored accent stripes (side-stripe borders)
Use gradient text — emphasis comes from weight or size, never gradients
Use red/green as the sole indicator of success/failure (accessibility)
Add unnecessary animations, onboarding tours, or attention-demanding empty states
